kinds.description: Service kind for command invocation mediation.
Service kind for validation command/evidence behavior.
Service kind for diagnostic collection, formatting, and evidence references.
Service kind for evidence packet production and lookup.
Service kind for package, pack, or content declaration workflows.
Service kind for profile declaration and selection workflows.
Service kind for app, module, pack, provider, and capability composition.
Service kind for governed document identity and document inspection.
Service kind for governed patch envelope validation.
Service kind for project graph queries and projections.
Service kind for render-facing capability selection; no renderer backend is claimed.
Service kind for platform-facing capability selection; no platform backend is claimed.
Service kind for storage-facing capability selection; no storage backend is claimed.
Service kind for network-facing capability selection; no network backend is claimed.
Service kind for audio-facing capability selection; no audio backend is claimed.
Service kind for input-facing capability selection; no input backend is claimed.
Service kind for module descriptor and module command/view relationships.
Service kind for Workbench-presented service-backed command surfaces.
Service kind for replay-facing evidence or compatibility behavior.

notes: Service kinds are vocabulary only. They are not implementation claims, runtime loaders, provider bindings, or product support.
